workflow_details.description: Add information that will help to differentiate this workflow from another.
workflow_details.title: Workflow Details

data_source.description: Select one of your configured data sources.

dji_api_key.description: Your DJI developer key, used to decrypt .txt flight log files. Get one free at developer.dji.com — create an app (select Open API), activate via email, then copy the ApiKey from the app detail page.
dji_api_key.title: DJI API Key

input_folder.description: Full path to the folder containing your exported .txt flight log files. Connect the RC Pro via USB, copy the logs folder to your computer, then paste the path here.
input_folder.title: Flight Logs Folder

event_type_name.description: The slug of the UAS Flight Folio event type in your EarthRanger instance. Leave blank to run in tracking-only mode — GPS tracks will be posted but no Flight Folio events will be created.
event_type_name.title: Flight Folio Event Type

aircraft_identity.description: Identifies the drone as a Subject in EarthRanger using its serial number. The Subject and Source are created automatically if they don't exist — these fields define their type and subtype.
aircraft_identity.title: Aircraft Identity

decimation_rate.description: How many GPS fixes per second to post to EarthRanger. DJI logs at ~10 Hz; the default 1 Hz gives smooth tracks with a 10× data reduction. Performance stats always use full-resolution data.
decimation_rate.title: Track Decimation Rate

operational_defaults.description: Operational settings applied to every flight in this batch. Leave Nature of Flight blank for mixed batches — it can be filled per-flight manually in EarthRanger.
operational_defaults.title: Flight Defaults
